body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness from predictive processing — the self as inference, dependent arising as Bayes-optimal perception.

**Cognitive and behavioural correlates of psychosis in genetic subtypes of Prader-Willi syndrome.**. Journal of psychiatric research.. PMID: 42407272. DOI: 10.1016/j.jpsychires.2026.06.054. BACKGROUND: Prader-Willi Syndrome (PWS) is arare neurodevelopmental disorder resulting from the loss of paternally expressed, maternally imprinted genes within the chromosome 15q11-q13 region. While core features such as hyperphagia and developmental delay are nearly universal, the maternal uniparental disomy (mUPD) subtype carries asignificantly higher risk of psychosis compared to the paternal deletion subtype.
